problem: Blocking the Node.js event loop during registry operations.
supportingEvidence: Found synchronous File System calls in tools registry loop.
expectedBenefit: Improved server responsiveness and concurrent request handling.
riskAssessment: Low; standard migration to async/await patterns.

problem: Maintenance difficulty of main UI file.
rootCause: Lack of component modularization and separation of concerns.
expectedBenefit: Increased code readability, reusability, and reduced bundle size.
riskAssessment: Medium; requires careful state management migration.
